actionCalls.description: Calls the AgentRecordCreate Apex action to create a new record or update an existing one based on whether a record ID is provided.
actionCalls.name: Create_Or_Update_Record
actionCalls.label: Create or Update Record

Flow.interviewLabel: WSM - ALF - Agent: Create or Update Record {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: WSM - ALF - Agent: Create or Update Record

variables.description: The API name of the Salesforce object to create or update a record on. Use the exact API name including the __c suffix for custom objects. Examples: Account, Contact, Opportunity, Case, My_Custom_Object__c. Call the Describe Object Schema action first if you are unsure of the correct name.
variables.name: objectApiName

variables.description: A JSON object mapping field API names to the values to set. Example: {"Name": "Acme Corp", "Industry": "Technology", "Phone": "555-1234"}. Use date format YYYY-MM-DD, datetime format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ, booleans as true or false, and numbers without currency symbols or commas. When updating, only include the fields you want to change — all other fields remain untouched. Set a field to null to clear its value.
variables.name: fieldValuesJson

variables.description: Optional for create, required for update. When provided, updates the existing record with this ID instead of creating a new one. Leave blank to create a new record. On success, this output contains the ID of the created or updated record.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: True if the record was created or updated successfully, false if there was an error. Always check this before using the record ID. When false, read errorMessage for details.
variables.name: success

variables.description: Description of the error when success is false. Common errors include: required field missing, invalid field value, insufficient access permissions, validation rule failure, record not found. Empty when success is true.
variables.name: errorMessage
